test.notes: One pre-existing environmental test pollution failure in cross_config_cascade (test_env_var_overrides_file_layers) when run with multiple threads. Single-threaded execution passes all tests.

issues.description: MCP health remains hardcoded as empty HashMap. The fix commit improved the comment to document that swell-daemon doesn't have direct access to MCP manager (which lives in swell-tools), but the implementation is unchanged. VAL-API-002 requires 'per-server MCP health statuses reflect actual server health'. This is a known architectural gap.
issues.requiredFix: Either: (1) Add MCP health monitoring infrastructure to swell-daemon that can track MCP server status, or (2) Adjust VAL-API-002 contract to clarify that MCP health is informational placeholder when MCP manager is unavailable, or (3) Have swell-daemon hold a reference to MCP manager to query live status.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify cross-crate architectural boundaries: swell-daemon intentionally does not access MCP manager (in swell-tools). If a feature requires MCP health monitoring, the architectural decision should be whether to: (a) grant daemon access to MCP status, (b) create a separate MCP health tracking mechanism accessible to daemon, or (c) adjust the API contract to reflect this limitation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: BLOCK-1: MCP health hardcoded in commands.rs:329 with comment explaining swell-daemon lacks MCP manager access

previousRound.summary: Round 1 found daemon-status with 3 blocking issues (BLOCK-1, BLOCK-2, BLOCK-3). Fix commit 5b2de0f addressed BLOCK-2 and BLOCK-3 but not BLOCK-1.

fixCommitAnalysis.message: fix(daemon-status): display all health fields and add swell status command
changes: Updated DaemonHealth handler in CLI to display all fields (active_connections, total_tasks, tasks_by_state, total_tokens, last_model, mcp_health, uptime_seconds, version, total_budget, total_spent, remaining_budget)
Updated DataResponse::DaemonHealth handler to show same comprehensive info
Improved MCP health comment to document placeholder status
